title: Chore: Add application metrics
original_text: Added application metrics with Prometheus. Implemented custom metrics for business logic. Added system metrics for CPU, memory, and disk. Implemented metrics endpoint for scraping. Added metrics dashboards with Grafana. Result: metrics operational.

- Add system metrics for CPU, memory, disk
